evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Identify and resolve data quality issues; query optimization; data modeling
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour-focused: emphasis on data quality, query optimization, and infrastructure reliability.
evidence.domain_risk: Fin is a fintech/banking platform; moderate due to lack of explicit regulatory language in JD.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: fintech sector, but JD language is generic around analytics without explicit financial reporting/regulatory signals.
evidence.collaboration_width: data infrastructure teams; internal analyst teams
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools in responsibilities (dbt, Snowflake), dedicated infrastructure teams, and mature tooling imply established function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design and build data models and core assets within the data warehouse
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: precise technical context (data warehouse assets, modeling) with clear application.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal_data: primary focus is building the platform and supporting internal analysts, not external commercial/product audiences.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design and build data models; Simplify and improve data collection
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic: autonomy in designing infrastructure and setting collection/modeling approaches, not just executing on specs.
evidence.ai_role: Unlimited access to Claude Code and AI tools
evidence.ai_role_explanation: AI user: candidate expected to use AI tools (explicitly Claude Code) to accelerate development work.
evidence.testing_framing: Identify and resolve data quality issues
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibility: data quality is an owned accountability, not just a tool in the stack.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Identify and resolve data quality issues; simplify and improve data collection
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate loss aversion: data reliability is a concern but not driven by regulatory/compliance fear.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Simplify and improve data collection and reporting processes
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: task is to improve and scale existing systems, not build greenfield.
evidence.loss_aversion: Identify and resolve data quality issues across systems — preventing pipeline breakage, not regulatory exposure.
